Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class DepressurizationSimulator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.DepressurizationSimulator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DepressurizationSimulator extends Object implements Serializable
Transient depressurization (blowdown) simulator for pressurized vessels.

Solves the coupled mass and energy balance for a vessel discharging through an orifice or blowdown valve. Tracks fluid temperature, pressure, inventory, and (optionally) a lumped wall metal temperature. Reports compliance against API 521 §5.20 / BS EN ISO 23251 acceptance criteria:

  • 50% of initial absolute pressure within 15 minutes (depressurization rate criterion)
  • Reach 7 barg within 15 minutes (fire-case criterion)
  • Minimum metal temperature does not fall below MDMT (cold blowdown criterion)

Mass flow uses isenthalpic compressible orifice relations (choked / subsonic). The internal energy balance uses Q_fire (optional, from API 521) minus enthalpy of discharged fluid.

References: API STD 521 (7th Ed), BS EN ISO 23251, NORSOK P-001.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    Set the lower-bound stop pressure in Pa (default 1.5 bara = ~atmospheric).

    Set the integration timestep (default 1 s).
    DepressurizationSimulator

  • Constructor Details

    • DepressurizationSimulator

      public DepressurizationSimulator(SystemInterface fluid, double vesselVolume, double orificeDiameter, double dischargeCoefficient, double backPressure)
      Construct a depressurization simulator.
      Parameters:
      fluid - initial fluid in the vessel; must already have mixing rule set
      vesselVolume - internal vessel volume in m³
      orificeDiameter - blowdown orifice diameter in m
      dischargeCoefficient - orifice Cd (typical 0.61–0.85)
      backPressure - downstream absolute pressure in Pa (typically flare header)

  • Method Details

    • setFireHeatInput

      public DepressurizationSimulator setFireHeatInput(double qFire)
      Set fire heat input per API 521 §4.3 (constant heat duty applied to the fluid).
      Parameters:
      qFire - fire heat input in W (positive value)
      Returns:
      this simulator for chaining

    • setWall

      public DepressurizationSimulator setWall(double wallMass, double wallArea, double wallSpecificHeat, double insideHTC)
      Enable lumped-wall thermal modelling for metal temperature tracking (cold blowdown / MDMT).
      Parameters:
      wallMass - total wall metal mass in kg
      wallArea - internal heat transfer area in m²
      wallSpecificHeat - metal specific heat in J/(kg·K) (470 for carbon steel)
      insideHTC - inside film heat transfer coefficient in W/(m²·K)
      Returns:
      this simulator for chaining

    • setTimeStep

      public DepressurizationSimulator setTimeStep(double dt)
      Set the integration timestep (default 1 s).
      Parameters:
      dt - timestep in s
      Returns:
      this simulator for chaining

    • setMaxTime

      public DepressurizationSimulator setMaxTime(double tMax)
      Set the maximum simulation time (default 900 s = 15 min).
      Parameters:
      tMax - maximum time in s
      Returns:
      this simulator for chaining

    • setStopPressure

      public DepressurizationSimulator setStopPressure(double pMin)
      Set the lower-bound stop pressure in Pa (default 1.5 bara = ~atmospheric).
      Parameters:
      pMin - stop pressure in Pa absolute
      Returns:
      this simulator for chaining

    • run

      public DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult run()
      Run the transient simulation and return the time-series result.
      Returns:
      result containing time, pressure, temperature, mass and metal-temperature trajectories
